productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Spectral Black Sports Shoes
description: Light and speedy looking, these all-leather adidas NEO LABEL Spectral shoes are fitted with a durable polyurethane outsole and features Vibe Complete comfort around the ankle, underfoot, and in those high-wear areas. Giving you the comfort you need to attack the day, these make for perfect light running shoes. The contrast synthetic adidas trademark three stripes signifying a mountain, pointing out towards the challenges that are seen ahead and goals that can be achieved add a touch of gravity to the shoes.Upper      Ultra low profile and soft textile, mesh and synthetic uppers      Smart Adidas three stripes in contrast      Central lace-up Fit for comfortable customised fit      Padded tongue and collar for snug fit      Adidas branding on synthetic patch over heel cup      Brand tab on the side stripesMidsole      Full length phylon midsole for lightweight structure      VibeComplete enhanced cushioning on the insole for a comfortable feel      Soft, cushy footbed for great comfort all dayOutsole      Rubber outsole with uniformly spaced 'S' shaped lugs for great traction and gripshoe careRub surface with clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine washStore away from sunlight
